title: ArdourCraft Unicode
description: ArdourCraft Unicode is a resource pack that is to be used by the ArdourCraft Minecraft server. As of the latest version of the resource pack, it adds 20 characters in the Unicode Private Use Area for use as the 20 letters in the Helqese constructed script.
body:
# ArdourCraft Unicode
## A resource pack originally made by Iris Lythica for her own Minecraft server
![A picrew image of a pink-haired catgirl wearing a blue shirt](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d0879b1449fd0d8e91562e45b822b0ec012a01b6.png)

ArdourCraft Unicode is a resource pack made by and for the ArdourCraft server.
As of the latest version, ArdourCraft Unicode adds 20 characters in the Unicode Private Use Area, divided into the following blocks:
* U+E000 to U+E01F - Helqese

If you want to contribute to the development of ArdourCraft Unicode, make sure to hop on over to the [AffecTV Studios](https://discord.gg/D94RaNZc6M) Discord server.
